Hero.subtitle: Wubaka Sisitemu zihamye kandi nziza bihebuje. Inararibonye mu mbuga za lukisire na porogaramu za ngendanwa zikozwe neza.

About.title: Ibyerekeye
About.description: Ndi uwubatsi wagutse (Full-stack developer) wiyemeje kubaka inararibonye z'ikoranabuhanga zidasanzwe. mpura ubumenyi bw'ubwubatsi bukomeye na twebwe nziza.

Services.title: Serivisi
Services.description: Ibisubizo byuzuye bikunze abakiriya b'icyubahiro. Kuva ku mbuga nziza cyane kugeza kuri sisitemu z'ibigo binini.

luxuryWeb.title: Gukora Imbuga za Lukisire
luxuryWeb.description: Inararibonye z'ikoranabuhanga ziteguye neza ku bigo bikomeye.

fullStack.title: Sisitemu Wagutse
fullStack.description: Ibiranga sisitemu z'ikoranabuhanga zukoze neza kugira ngo zaguke.

mobileApps.title: Gukora Porogaramu za Ngendanwa
mobileApps.description: Porogaramu za ngendanwa zifite imikorere yo hejuru.

maintenance.title: Gufata neza Sisitemu
maintenance.description: Gukomeza gukurikirana no kunoza imikorere buri gihe.

mentorship.title: Kwigisha Porogaramu
mentorship.description: Vugutira akazi kawe umurego mufashijwe n'inzobere.

Projects.title: Imirimo
Projects.description: Ikusanyirizo ry'inararibonye z'ikoranabuhanga nubatse. Gukemura ibibazo bikomeye mu buryo bwiza kandi bwaguka.

aura.title: Aura E-Commerce Platform
aura.description: Urubuga rwa lukisire rucururizwaho imyambaro rufite ibikoresho by'ako kanya n'uburyo bugezweho bwo kwishyura.

vanguard.title: Vanguard Fitness App
vanguard.description: Porogaramu ya ngendanwa ifasha mu gukurikirana imyitozo ngororangingo k'umuntu ku giti cye.

nimbus.title: Nimbus Cloud ERP
nimbus.description: Sisitemu yo gucunga ibikoresho by'ikigo ifite ubwubatsi bw'imigabane n'uburyo bwo kugenzura uwinjira.

luxe.title: Luxe Real Estate
luxe.description: Urubuga ruhuza abagura n'abagurisha amazu rufite amakarita n'izindi miterere ishimishije.

Testimonials.title: Ubuhamya
Testimonials.description: Umva ibyo abatanga udushya n'abayobozi nishimiye gukorana nabo bavuga.

sarah.name: Sarah Johnson
sarah.content: Gukorana na Shalom byahinduye byinshi kuri paji yacu. Kwita ku bintu byose n'ubuhanga mu bwubatsi bwa software ni ntagereranywa.

david.name: David Chen
david.content: Ubwiza buhanitse bazanye ku mbuga zacu bwahise bwongera imibare y'abakiriya badusura. Mu by'ukuri ni umwubatsi w'imbuga uri ku rwego rwo hejuru.

aisha.name: Aisha Kamali
aisha.content: Ni umunyamwuga cyane kandi yatanze paji ya fintech igoye mbere y'igihe cyari giteganyijwe. Ubuziranenge bwa kodi ye ni bwiza cyane.

Contact.description: Witeguye gushyira mu bikorwa icyerekezo cyawe? Uzuza ifomu ikurikira kugira ngo usabe ibiciro cyangwa ushyireho gahunda yo kugisha inama.
Contact.successMessage: Murakoze kutuvugisha. Twakiriye ibisobanuro by'umushinga wanyu kandi tuzabavugisha mu masaha 24 kugira ngo tuganire ku ntabwe zikurikira.

Footer.description: Wubaka Sisitemu zihamye kandi nziza bihebuje. Inararibonye mu mbuga za lukisire na porogaramu za ngendanwa zikozwe neza.

DashboardOverview.subtitle: Ibi nibyo biri kubera ku mishinga yawe uyu munsi.

DashboardContract.title: Gucunga Amasezerano
DashboardContract.subtitle: Suzuma, sinya, kandi ucunge amasezerano y'umushinga wawe.
DashboardContract.legalNoticeText: Iyi nyandiko irinzwe n'uburyo buhanitse bwa encryption. Ibikozwe byose birandikwa kugira ngo hubahirizwe amategeko.

intro.title: 1. IMPANDE ZUMVIKANYE
intro.content: Aya masezerano yakozwe hagati ya Shalom Developer ('Uwubatsi') n'Umukiriya nk'uko bigaragara kuri konti ye.

scope.title: 2. INGANO Y'AKAZI
scope.content: Uwubatsi yemeye gutanga ibi bikoresho by'indashyikirwa mu gihe cyumvikanyweho:

payment.title: 3. UBURYO BWO KWISHYURA
payment.content: Ubwishyu bukorwa igihe habaye imurikwa rya mbere ry'ibyo umushinga ugomba gukora. Uburyo bwo kugira imigabane mu mushinga burahari nk'uko bigaragara mu mugereka w'amasezerano.

Privacy.title: Amategeko y'ibanga
Privacy.description: Ibanga ryawe naryo riri mu by'ibanze. Menya uko turinda amakuru yawe n'ubunyangamugabo bw'umushinga mu gihe cyose twafatanyije.

data.title: Kurinda Amakuru
data.content1: Twitaho cyane ku mutekano w'amakuru y'umushinga wawe n'amakuru yawe bwite. Ibivugwa byose n'ibikoresho by'umushinga mu gihe cy'amasezerano bikoranwa ibanga rikomeye.
data.content2: Ntabwo dusangira ibisobanuro by'umushinga wawe, ibarirwa ry'ubwenge, cyangwa amakuru yawe bwite n'abandi bantu batari mu masezerano tutabyumvikanyeho mu nyandiko.

transparency.title: Umunyemugabo w'Umushinga
transparency.content1: Nk'igice cy'ubwitange bwacu ku bwiza, dukora ubugenzuzi buhoraho bw'imishinga twakoze mu gihe cy'amezi 6 ya mbere. Ibi ni ukugira ngo hashingirwe ku kuramba no gukomeza kubahiriza urwego rw'umutekano.
transparency.content2: Ufite ububasha bwo kureba ko umushinga uri kugenda neza binyuze ku iwinjiriro ry'abakiriya, aho ushobora kureba aho umushinga ugeze n'intambwe zishojwe.

contract.title: Ibanga ry'Amasezerano
contract.content1: Amasezerano yacu asinywe arimo ingingo zikomeye zo kutamena ibanga (NDA) kugira ngo zirinde inyungu zawe z'ubucuruzi. Ibi bigera kuri kodi zose, ibishushanyo, n'inama z'uburyo bwo gukora byatanzwe mu gihe cy'amasezerano.

Terms.title: Amategeko n'Amabwiriza
Terms.description: Kugaragaza ibintu neza n'ubwitange nibyo shingiro ry'ubufatanye bw'icyubahiro. Aya amategeko agena uburyo dukora n'abakiriya bacu.

engagement.title: 1. Gutangira Umushinga
engagement.content1: Imishinga yose itangirana n'amasezerano yemewe asinywe. Iyi nyandiko igena ingano y'umushinga, ibisobanuro birambuye, n'amasezerano y'igihe cyagenwe cyo kuwushyira mu bikorwa.
engagement.content2: Twiyemeje gutanga icyitegererezo cya mbere (template) cy'umushinga mu gihe cy'iminsi 5 y'akazi uhereye igihe amasezerano yasinyiwe, kugira ngo tubone ibitekerezo byawe hakiri kare.

payment.title: 2. Ubwishyu n'Ubusangi mu Mushinga
payment.content1: Ubwishyu bukorwa igihe habaye imurikwa rya mbere ry'ibyo umushinga ugomba gukora. Ibi ni ukugira ngo tumenye ko umukiriya anyuzwe n'icyerekezo n'ishingiro ry'ibiri gukorwa.
payment.content2: Mu gihe umukiriya adafite amafaranga ako kanya, dutanga uburyo bwo kugira imigabane mu mushinga (shares). Abakiriya bashobora guhitamo gutanga imigabane mu mushinga nk'uburyo bw'ubwishyu, hashingiwe ku gaciro k'umushinga n'amasezerano y'ubufatanye yihariye.

maintenance.title: 3. Kwitaho k'Umushinga nyuma yo kuwutanga
maintenance.content1: Dutanga amezi 6 yo kwitaho ku mushinga ku bw'ubuntu kuri buri mushinga twakoze. Ibi bikubiyemo gukosora amakosa akomeye, kugenzura imikorere, n'ubugenzuzi buhoraho bwa sisitemu kugira ngo ikomeze gukora neza cyane.

hosting.title: 4. Ahantu Umushinga uba (Hosting)
hosting.content1: Abakiriya bafite uburenganzira bwuzuye bwo kwihitiramo aho umushinga wabo uzaba. Dutanga serivisi z'icyubahiro zo kubibafasha ku kiguzi cyiyongereyeho, cyangwa dushobora kubafasha kuwushyira aho mwihitiyemo.

footer.agreement: Mu gukoresha serivisi zacu, wemera amategeko yavuzwe haruguru. Aya amategeko agengwa n'amasezerano yihariye y'umushinga yasinywe igihe watangiraga.
